title: Seven Wonders of the World
director: Tay Garnett, Paul Mantz, Andrew Marton
writer: Prosper Buranelli, W.P. Lipscomb, Lowell Thomas
actors: Lowell Thomas, Paul Mantz, Claude Dauphin
plot: Lowell Thomas searches the world for natural and man made wonders and invites the audience to try to update the ancient Greek list of "Seven Wonders of the World."
